title: Clean python SCHC modules and update schc_fragment vectors
description: Review python/src/lichen/schc/*.py (esp. fragment.py) for merge artifacts, dead code, ruff issues, comments. Remove all comments/docstrings per guidelines. Ensure schc_fragment.json vectors use independent CRC32 oracle matching FragmentSender.compute_mic and to_bytes(). Make ruff clean. Update generate.py and vectors if needed. No comments in final code. Close all related issues.
